jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Added the Kotlin Standard Library dependency to support Kotlin source code compilation.
Configured Maven to look for main source code in the Kotlin directory.
Added the Kotlin Maven Plugin with Spring and JPA compiler plugins to compile Kotlin code.
Updated the compiler source and target properties to use the new java.version property.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Adopt Spring Boot 3.2.1 parent POM to manage dependencies and ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.0.4, which is required for Java 21 and Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Upgrade Spring Security to version 6.2.1 to match the Spring Framework 6 ecosystem.
Upgrade Apache Camel to version 4.3.0, which supports Java 21 and integrates with Spring Boot 3.
Upgrade Jetty to version 11.0.19 to support Java 21 and modern servlet specifications.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI Docker image from OpenJDK 17 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the target Java version.

.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 to match the target runtime.
